# Sujal Sule

> MERN Stack Developer, Full-Stack Software Engineer & Hackathon Builder — CS Engineering Student from India specializing in scalable web applications and AI-powered platforms.

## Profile Summary
Sujal Sule is a Full-Stack Developer and Computer Science Engineering student from India. He specializes in building scalable, high-performance web applications using the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js), TypeScript, Python, FastAPI, and modern frontend frameworks. With hands-on experience from multiple national-level hackathons (including podium finishes) and a portfolio of deployed production applications, Sujal combines strong engineering fundamentals with creative problem-solving. His expertise spans frontend architecture, backend system design, AI/ML integration, real-time WebSocket communication, and blockchain/Web3 development.

## Primary Domain
- [Portfolio Website](https://sujalsule.in/)

## Contact
- **Email:** sujalsule31@gmail.com

## Technical Stack
- **Languages:** JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, Python, HTML5, CSS3, SQL, C/C++
- **Frontend:** React 19, Next.js, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Three.js, React Three Fiber, WebGL
- **Backend:** Node.js, Express.js, FastAPI, RESTful APIs, WebSockets, NodeMailer
- **Databases:** MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Firebase (Firestore), Supabase
- **AI/ML:** Google Gemini AI, TensorFlow, OpenCV, RAG Pipelines
- **Cloud & DevOps:** Vercel, Google Cloud Platform, Render, Git, GitHub
- **Other:** Web3, Blockchain, Expo React Native, Mapbox GL, Leaflet, Recharts

## Core Projects

### SkillSwap — AI-Powered Skill Exchange Platform
- **URL:** [skillswap.sujalsule.in](https://skillswap.sujalsule.in/)
- **Stack:** React, TypeScript, Vite, FastAPI, Python, MongoDB, Firebase, Gemini AI, WebSockets
- **Highlights:** Real-time peer-to-peer collaboration, AI-powered matching, WebSocket-based live workspace sync. Won 2nd Runner Up at GDG IIPS DAVV hackathon.

### SafePulse — Smart Crowd Safety System
- **URL:** [safepulse.teamcodezilla.in](https://safepulse.teamcodezilla.in/)
- **Stack:** React, TypeScript, Vite, Mapbox GL, Python, Firebase, Supabase
- **Highlights:** Real-time crowd density mapping, animated gauge dashboards, emergency alerting. Finalist at Project Morpheus (SIT Lonavala).

### EchoBook — Gemini AI Dynamic Storytelling
- **URL:** [echobook.sujalsule.in](https://echobook.sujalsule.in/)
- **Stack:** Next.js, React, TypeScript, FastAPI, Python, WebSockets, Firebase, Gemini Live API
- **Highlights:** Multimodal AI storytelling, real-time voice/text interaction, multi-turn conversation architecture. Built for Google Cloud Gemini Live Agent Challenge.

### SafeFlow — Traffic & Crowd Flow Management
- **URL:** [safeflow.teamcodezilla.in](https://safeflow.teamcodezilla.in/)
- **Stack:** React, TypeScript, Vite, Leaflet, Python, FastAPI
- **Highlights:** Intelligent traffic management, real-time map visualization, urban mobility analytics.

### Origyn — Blockchain Supply Chain Traceability
- **URL:** [GitHub](https://github.com/Sujal-Sule/Origyn)
- **Stack:** React, TypeScript, Vite, FastAPI, Python, Expo React Native, WebSockets, Web3
- **Highlights:** Blockchain provenance tracking, IoT telemetry, dual-client system (web + mobile).

### AAROGYA AI — Preventive Health Ecosystem
- **URL:** [GitHub](https://github.com/Sujal-Sule/Team_CodeZilla_AAROGYA.AI)
- **Stack:** React, TypeScript, Vite, FastAPI, Python, Firebase, Google Gemini, TensorFlow, OpenCV
- **Highlights:** AI-driven medical advice, real-time yoga posture correction with pose estimation, RAG document analysis, fall detection.

## Hackathon Achievements
1. **Glitch the Grid (GDG IIPS DAVV, 2026):** 2nd Runner Up — SkillSwap
2. **BGI Hackathon (2026):** First Web3 Build — Origyn
3. **Project Morpheus (SIT Lonavala, 2026):** Finalist — SafePulse
4. **Gemini Live Agent Challenge (Google Cloud, 2026):** Participant — EchoBook
5. **HACKATRON (IIITM Gwalior, 2025):** Participant — AAROGYA AI
6. **Odoo Hackathon (Gandhinagar, 2025):** Top 200 Nationwide — SkillSwap v1.0

## Availability
Currently available for hire and open to full-stack development opportunities, hackathon collaborations, freelance projects, and engineering partnerships.
